'''√g-l-sh''' ('''kagalash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maintain|maintain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maintain|maintain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-l-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kagalash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigalash || jigalash || shigalash || kigalash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugalash || jujugalash || shushugalash || kukugalash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugalash || jugalash || shugalash || kugalash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugalash || jugalash || shugalash || kugalash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegalash || jegalash || shegalash || kegalash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogalash || jojogalash || shoshogalash || kokogalash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogalash || jogalash || shogalash || kogalash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogalash || jogalash || shogalash || kogalash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || galash || galash || galash || galash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || galash || galash || galash || galash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || galash || galash || galash || galash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || galash || galash || galash || galash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægalash || jægalash || shægalash || kægalash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagalash || jajagalash || shashagalash || kakagalash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagalash || jagalash || shagalash || kagalash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagalash || jagalash || shagalash || kagalash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagalash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagalash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagalash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagalashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagalashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagalashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagalashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagalashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagalashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagalashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagalashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagalashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagalashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagalashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagalashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagalashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagalashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagalashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagalashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagalashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagalashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagalashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagalashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagalashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagalashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagalashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagalashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagalashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagalashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagalashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagalashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagalashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagalashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagalashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagalashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagalashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagalashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagalashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagalashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagalashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagalashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagalashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagalashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagalashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagalashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagalashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagalashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagalashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagalashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagalashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagalashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagalashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagalashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagalashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagalashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagalashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagalashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagalashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagalashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagalashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagalashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagalashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagalashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
